# Test fixtures

These files are **fake** (non-personal) fixtures you can use for local development and tests.

- `mock_resume.txt` — a sample CV/resume input (plain text)
- `mock_job_description.txt` — a sample job description (plain text)
- `mock_job_posting.json` — the same job as structured `JobPosting` JSON
- `mock_resume_body.html` — a minimal valid resume HTML `<body>` for renderer/validator smoke tests
